attributes.title: HEGO - Country Profile
attributes.description: Per-country view with event timeline, APT groups, sanctions, and risk score. Use the country selector control to filter.

attributes.title: Country Selector
attributes.description: Dropdown to select a country for filtering

attributes.title: Country Event Timeline
attributes.description: Timeline of GDELT + ACLED + CTI events for the selected country

attributes.title: Attributed APT Groups
attributes.description: APT groups attributed to the selected country from OpenCTI

attributes.title: Active Sanctions
attributes.description: Current sanctions against the selected country

attributes.title: Composite Risk Score
attributes.description: Aggregated risk score based on events, tone, and cyber activity

attributes.title: Recent Articles
attributes.description: Latest RSS articles mentioning the selected country
